title: Claim Evidence Registry minimal anlegen
goal: Eine schlanke doc-freshness Registry für tragende agentenrelevante Claims ergänzen, ohne Ballast aufzubauen.

acceptance.assertion: docs/doc-freshness-registry.yml existiert und enthält die tragenden Claims des Plans.
Die Registry bleibt auf auditierte Claims begrenzt und wird nicht zur allgemeinen Dokumentationsliste.
RepoBrief kann die Registry als Claim-Evidence-Oberfläche verwenden oder die erwartete Struktur ist dokumentiert.

metadata.queue_readiness_repair: 2026-07-08: next heimlern write ball; repo claim made explicit for repo-scoped queue projection.
metadata.source_plan_note: Task metadata named docs/plans/heimlern-optimization-plan-v1.md, but the live repo contains the RepoBrief audit plan; PR #192 follows its PR 4 evidence-surface section.
metadata.outcome: Added a minimal RepoBrief/rLens claim-evidence registry for heimlern with six audited agent-relevant claims, explicit diagnostic authority and non-claims, plus a focused test that keeps evidence targets resolvable and prevents the registry from becoming a general documentation index.

validated_acceptance.registry-present: docs/doc-freshness-registry.yml exists in Heimlern PR #192 and contains the audit-plan claims for contract ownership, learning cycle, no-auto-apply, weight adjustment output, offline outcome ingest and metrics workflow wiring.
validated_acceptance.minimal-scope: tests/test_doc_freshness_registry.py asserts exactly six expected claim IDs and scope=audited_agent_relevant_claims_only.
validated_acceptance.repobrief-useful: docs/doc-freshness-registry.md documents RepoBrief/rLens consumption as claim-evidence navigation only, with canonical authority remaining in referenced code, contracts, fixtures, tests and docs.

validation: Heimlern PR #192 GitHub CI passed: Analyze actions/python/rust, CodeQL, build-test, repo-root, schema-validate and templates.

Local before merge: py_compile for registry test and relevant scripts passed; pytest tests/test_doc_freshness_registry.py passed; CI-shaped schema/OLA checks passed; cargo fmt, clippy and cargo test passed; diff-check passed.

Post-merge on origin/main 84c72306c355cf26c574d01e7f56b35bd207cbbb: registry pytest passed; schema samples validated; rejected feedback fixture remained rejected; OLA self-tests passed; cargo fmt and cargo test passed; diff-check passed.
